calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem David Porter, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.Appellant, Laus Investment Group present in Pro Per and represented by Sophie Lau; Respondent, Kai-Wen Cheng appears in Pro Per. Parties and witnesses are sworn. Nathan Kin appears as a witness for Mr. Wai-Wen and Caroline Balfour appears as a witness for Laus Investment Group. Both parties present their cases in the narrative. (Ms. Balfour did not testify)
10:03am
The matter is submitted. Some evidence for the appellant was retained by the Court, but not marked or identified by the Court. No evidence from the respondent was retained.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2008 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
